items: Roll Call
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Administer Oath of Office
President of the Board of Trustees
Vice President of the Board of Trustees
Clerk of the Board of Trustees
Secretary to the Board of Trustees (Superintendent)
Representative to San Mateo County Committee on School District Organization
Liaison to California School Boards Association and the San Mateo County School Boards Association
Reception
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Report on Local Indicator Measurement for the California Dashboard
Discussion of School Assignments and Committee Assignments for Board Members for the Remainder of the 2024-25 School Year
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of Addendum to the 2024-25 Measure U Application for Roosevelt School
Approval of Annual Developer Fee Report - Fiscal Year 2023-24
Approval of the 2024/25 First Interim Budget Report for RCSD
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to the agenda were announced. The meeting proceeded in the posted order after the opening ceremonies and recognitions.
